title: Substack vs Zoho Campaigns (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Substack vs Zoho Campaigns: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool.
h1: Substack vs Zoho Campaigns: Side-by-Side Comparison (2025)
intro: Choosing between Substack and Zoho Campaigns comes down to your specific use case. Substack is built for writers monetising directly from subscribers, while Zoho Campaigns targets Zoho users and budget-conscious businesses.
choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on writers monetising directly from subscribers
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on Zoho users and budget-conscious businesses

faq.q: Is Substack better than Zoho Campaigns?
faq.a: It depends on your use case. Substack wins for writers monetising directly from subscribers, while Zoho Campaigns is stronger for Zoho users and budget-conscious businesses.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Substack or Zoho Campaigns?
faq.a: Substack starts at a lower price point. Pricing scales with subscriber count so total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from Zoho Campaigns to Substack?
faq.a: Yes, switching is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export. Plan time to recreate automations and templates.
